title: Chatbots at the drive-thru are just the beginning
summary: McDonald's deployed AI chatbots for drive-thru voice ordering starting in 2021, initially at 10 Chicago locations following the company's 2019 acquisition of conversational AI startup Apprente. The implementation signals how AI assistants are increasingly integrating into everyday consumer services.
content:
This is The Stepback, a weekly newsletter breaking down one essential story from the tech world. For more news about how AI is seeping into our daily lives, follow Emma Roth. The Stepback arrives in our subscribers' inboxes at 8AM ET. Opt in for The Stepback here. 
How it started
In 2021, McDonald's became one of the first major fast-food chains to greet customers with an AI chatbot at the drive-thru. It started small, deploying the voice-ordering technology at 10 of its locations in Chicago. McDonald's developed its drive-thru tech after acquiring Apprente, a startup focused on voice-based, conversational technology in 2019, and later wor …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 汽车餐厅里的聊天机器人才只是开始
zh.summary: 麦当劳从2021年开始在得来速窗口部署AI聊天机器人进行语音订购，最初在芝加哥的10家门店进行，这是继该公司2019年收购对话AI初创公司Apprente之后的举措。这一实施表明AI助手正日益融入日常消费者服务中。

title: A revolutionary cancer treatment could transform autoimmune disease
summary: Researchers are testing CAR T cell therapy—an immunotherapy approach originally developed for cancer treatment—as a method to reset malfunctioning immune systems and treat autoimmune diseases. If successful, the therapy could represent a significant shift in how such diseases are managed.
content: Researchers are testing CAR T cell therapy as a way to reset the immune system.

zh.title: 革命性癌症疗法或将改变自身免疫病治疗
zh.summary: 研究人员正在测试CAR T细胞疗法——一种最初为癌症治疗而开发的免疫疗法——作为重置失灵免疫系统并治疗自身免疫病的方法。如果成功，这种疗法可能代表自身免疫病管理方式的重大转变。
